case_title: ALISON FLECK ET AL VS. ALISSA MASUDA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MASUDA, ALISSA HEARING SET FOR DEC-08-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL **GRANTED**
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 15, 2021 AT 1:30 P.M (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED SEP-17-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MASUDA, ALISSA
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ALISSA MASUDA SET FOR DEC-08-2021 IS CONTINUED TO FEB-10-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN 506.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,289.67 FILED BY FLECK, ALISON FLECK, BLAKE AS TO DEFENDANT MASUDA, ALISSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ALISSA MASUDA SET FOR FEB-10-2022 IS CONTINUED TO APR-13-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN 506.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ALISSA MASUDA IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO MAY-09-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. DEFENDANT WILL PAYPAL $3,600.00 TO THE PLAINTIFF BY APRIL 20, 2022 AS A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. THE PRIOR JUDGMENT ISSUED ON OCTOBER 15, 2021 IS VACATED. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT PROGRESS REPORT DATE IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED. APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE AS AGREED. PLAINTIFF BLAKE FLECK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALISSA MASUDA IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-15-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALISON FLECK IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF BLAKE FLECK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALISSA MASUDA IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2021 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS MOTION TO VACATE HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-15-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-15-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ALISON FLECK IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BLAKE FLECK, HUSBAND. PLAINTIFF BLAKE FLECK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALISSA MASUDA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLECK, ALISON FLECK, BLAKE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MASUDA, ALISSA $5,287.67 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,362.67 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (RE: MOTION TO VACATE HEARING SET FOR: DEC-08-2021 AT 1:30PM); (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLECK, ALISON
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MASUDA, ALISSA
